arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk points the finger of blame at Everton star after FOUR sent off in mass brawl
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk didn't hold back with his assessment of the post match clash that marred Wednesday night's Merseyside derby, which ended 2-2 at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Van Dijk on Merseyside derby: Ref lost control
arts.sum: Liverpool's Virgil van Dijk said he believes referee Michael Oliver "lost control" of Wednesday's Merseyside derby with four red cards being shown.

arts.ttl: Liverpool must live with permanent Everton truth after ugly scenes and James Tarkowski drama
arts.sum: Match verdict from Joe Thomas after the final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Premier League confirms every red card shown in Everton vs Liverpool post-match chaos
arts.sum: Both Everton and Liverpool had players sent off after a dramatic end to the Merseyside derby saw the points shared at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Liverpool will have two problems with goal decision as Everton response to replays say everything
arts.sum: Ian Doyle with the main talking point after Liverpool were denied victory in a controversial Merseyside derby against Everton at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Everton sponsor leaves UK after porn ad probe
arts.sum: Gambling site Stake will leave the UK as a regulator investigation continues.

arts.ttl: Liverpool manager Arne Slot one of four people sent off in wild finish to Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot was one of four people sent off after the final whistle Wednesday in a wild ending to Goodison Park’s last-ever Merseyside derby. After it finally settled down, Doucoure and Jones were both shown second yellow cards by referee Michael Oliver and therefore sent off.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot and his assistant Sipke Hulshoff both SENT OFF in chaotic scenes after full-time against Everton - so who will take charge of Liverpool vs Wolves?
arts.sum: Arne Slot and his assistant Sipke Hulshoff were sent off for their part in a confrontation that erupted between Liverpool and Everton after the final whistle was blown at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Premier League explain FOUR red cards after Everton vs Liverpool derby ends in carnage
arts.sum: Last-ever Merseyside clash at Goodison Park sees chaos break out after James Tarkowski’s dramatic last-gasp equaliser

arts.ttl: 'I said that to him': Virgil van Dijk shares what he told Michael Oliver after chaotic Liverpool draw at Everton tonight
arts.sum: Liverpool and Everton played out a dramatic 2-2 draw in the final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park on Wednesday night. The Reds found themselves a...
